name: Parade Technologies, Ltd.
summary: Parade Technologies, Ltd., a fabless semiconductor company, designs, develops, and sells high-speed interface standards, and touch controller and display processing integrated circuit (IC) chips for products used in computers, consumer electronics, and display panels. The company offers display port LCD timing controllers, embedded display port timing controllers, display port format converters, display port transmitters and receivers, and scalers with display port and high definition multimedia interface (HDMI) inputs; high-speed interface solutions; display port based solutions; display port repeater and switch products, including serial advanced technology architecture, PCI express, HDMI/DVI, and universal serial bus products; source drivers; and truetouch controllers, and touch and display driver integrations, as well as mixed-signal ICs. It operates in South Korea, China, Taiwan, Japan, and internationally. Parade Technologies, Ltd. was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in George Town, Cayman Islands.
